examples.title: PDA Example
examples.description: An example of a PDA recognizing a context-free language
examples.explanation: This PDA recognizes the context-free language {a^n b^n | n >= 0}

examples.title: CFG Example
examples.description: An example of a CFG generating a context-free language
examples.explanation: This CFG generates the context-free language {a^n b^n | n >= 0}

examples.title: FA Example
examples.description: An example of a FA recognizing a regular language
examples.explanation: This FA recognizes the regular language {ab}

examples.title: TM Example
examples.description: An example of a TM recognizing a recursively enumerable language
examples.explanation: This TM recognizes the recursively enumerable language {epsilon}
